title: Latvia could offer aid for drone-damaged property
summary_full: If a military drone damages private property, the government could offer some form of compensation, Prime Minister Evika Siliņa (New Unity) said on Tuesday. A discussion on this topic reportedly took place earlier this week during a coalition meeting.
